title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at National Insurance Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at National Insurance Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with National Insurance Holdings Services! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Surat team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About National Insurance Holdings Services:
National Insurance Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance Holdings Services!
